'''Doornik-628A''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Doornik-628 system]],<ref name="Temples and Tybis" /> located in the [[Farlax sector/Legends|Farlax sector]].<ref name="Farlax" /> It was a part of the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]],<ref name="Temples and Tybis" /> itself a region of [[the Negs]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="Temples and Tybis" /> One of the three [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giants]] in the [[Star system/Legends|system]], which was centered around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Doornik-628]], Doornik-628A was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by three [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="Temples and Tybis" />

==Behind the scenes==
Doornik-628A was mentioned in "J't'p'tan: Temples and Tybis," an article written by [[Jason Fry]] and published on [[Wizards.com]] on [[January 30]], [[2003]].<ref name="Temples and Tybis" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Doornik-628 system, and therefore Doornik-628A, in grid square K-10.<ref name="TEA" />
